properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: May this life that I live bring you praise Blessing You and Your wonderful ways In the work of my hands and the words that I say I will worship You Lord all my days

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will sing to Your name when I wake Giving thanks for each breath that I take From the first light I see to the last prayer I pray I will worship You Lord all my days

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All my days, (all my days) All my days, (all my days) I will worship You Lord all my days All my days, (all my days) All my days, I will worship You Lord all my days

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: May this life that I life make you glad Help me praise you with all that I have May the thoughts of my heart bring a smile to Your face I will worship You Lord all my days

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Everyday is a gift from Your hand You're the author of all that I am May my story be told in this heart-spoken phrase I will worship You Lord all my days

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All my days, (all my days) All my days, (all my days) I will worship You Lord all my days For as long as I live by Your power and grace I will worship You Lord, (worship You Lord) I will worship You Lord, (worship You Lord) I will worship You Lord, all my days
